title: Before implementing, briefly analyze: which files need changes, potential breaking changes, edge cases. Then implement the task. Task: Review failed: review score 4/10 (min 7) issues to fix: - Then list up to 5 concrete fix items, one per line, using numbered or '-' bullets. - If score >= 7, do not...
summary_text: Updated [canon-v3-verifier.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh#L29) and [test-canon-v3-verifier.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/test-canon-v3-verifier.sh#L77). Brief analysis: the only files that needed changes were the verifier’s review-output filter/prompt and its focused regression test; breaking risk was low because the queued failure format stays unchanged; the main edge case was prompt-echo text being misclassified as fix items, especially the exact `codex` / `I’m reviewing the uncommitted diff...` preamble you reported. Implemented: [canon-v3-verifier.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh#L35) now filters that preamble and a couple of adjacent prompt-echo lines, and [canon-v3-verifier.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh#L264) now tells `codex` not to emit that preamble in the first place. [test-canon-v3-verifier.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/test-canon-v3-verifier.sh#L95) adds the exact reported failure shape to prevent regressions. Verified with `bash -n assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh assets/scripts/test-canon-v3-verifier.sh` and `bash assets/scripts/test-canon-v3-verifier.sh`.
